axes.label: Engagement Mechanism
axes.evidence_basis: Rejected Gamified progression, Playful Gamification, and Gamification.

axes.label: Data Visualization
axes.evidence_basis: Stated intent to avoid a spreadsheet feel.

edge_case_flags: Requires non-traditional UI that remains serious

scout_assignments.reason: Determine if user prefers minimalist charts, abstract art, or narrative data since grids and games are out.
Test if the user prefers a zen and calm interface or a sleek and premium professional interface.
Explore how to motivate the user through AI insights or narrative summaries without using badges or points.

persona_anima_divergence: User explicitly wants to avoid a boring spreadsheet but aggressively rejects the standard fun alternative of gamification, indicating a desire for sophisticated elegance or calm visualization rather than playfulness.
